planet.name: Uranus
planet.description: The ice giant rotating on its side. A mysterious blue-green world of methane clouds and extreme winds. Home to the Deep Space Observatories, a network of research stations studying the outer solar system and interstellar space.

moons.name: Titania
moons.description: Largest moon of Uranus. Shows evidence of past geological activity.

stations.name: Uranus Observation Post
stations.description: Long-term research facility studying atmospheric phenomena.
